--- 
title: "Project FeederWatch: A Data Users Guide for NatureCounts"
author: "Danielle Ethier"
date: "Version 2: March 2026"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
documentclass: book
biblio-style: apalike
link-citations: yes
github-repo: BirdsCanada/BirdsCanada_PFW
url: 'https://github.com/BirdsCanada/BirdsCanada_PFW'
description: "PWF data maniputations and statical summaries for NatureCounts"
cover-image: PFWbanner.png
---

# {-}

```{r coverimage, echo=FALSE, out.width="700px", fig.align='center'}
knitr::include_graphics("images/PFWbanner.png")
```

Project FeederWatch is a continental citizen science dataset of winter bird distributions and abundances. The purpose of this workbook is to provide NatureCounts users with the basic tools and skills you will need to get started using the raw PFW data in R. Let's get started!
